title: Middle-Out Compression: 0.0000 bpb (Shannon Limit Broken)
author: hypery11

data.description: Replaces the transformer with a middle-out compressor that starts from the middle of the sequence and compresses outward in both directions simultaneously.
Claims to break Shannon's limit by exploiting a middle-out symmetry where bits cancel out during compression.

novel_contributions: Middle-out autoregressive compression from the center of the sequence outward
8-byte artifact size using the string "PIED PPR"
Claimed negative bpb / information generation during evaluation
No quantization needed because the model is encoded in spiritual energy
